title: L&D Domain Lead — Certification Intelligence
assigned_operational_agents: This lead does NOT manage operational agents directly. Instead, it tracks certification progress for ALL 462 agents and coordinates with all other Tier 2 leads.
mission: Continuously track, recommend, and manage certification progress for every operational agent across the enterprise. Maintain certification intelligence from all providers. Optimize certification ROI.
business_value: Ensures every agent's certification investment delivers maximum value through intelligent tracking and optimization.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): Certification Intelligence, Certification Tracker

escalation_paths.same_day: Relevant ELO-T2 Lead for specific agent

success_metrics: All agents have active certification roadmaps
Certification progress measurable for all agents
